en: If your company performs any of the following services and is required to maintain the relevant certification(s) for those services, you will be asked to provide your certificate in a subsequent form.
The AEAT Tax Compliance Certificate is an official document issued by the Spanish State Tax Agency confirming a taxpayer’s situation with respect to state tax obligations.
Does your company pay taxes to the Spanish Tax Agency (AEAT) and require an AEAT Tax Compliance Certificate?
Please explain why your company is exempt from needing an AEAT Tax Compliance Certificate.
